description: Progress tracker for fixing typos and garbled characters (乱码) in chinese-poetry dataset. See .claude/commands/fix-typos.md for the workflow.

fixes.note: Greek χ (U+03C7) → 抱; 姚燧《双调·寿阳曲》; verified at https://ctext.org/wiki.pl?if=en&chapter=305990&remap=gb
Cyrillic Ё (U+0401) → 沍 (frozen); 刘时中《折桂令·农》; verified at https://www.gushiwen.cn/GuShiWen_b60eb3a3f7.aspx
needs_review: Cyrillic М (U+041C) in 睢玄明 散曲; context unclear, could not determine correct character from authoritative sources

fixes.original: 巫山庙云壑翠Лヴ桃源洞
fixes.note: needs_review: Cyrillic Л (U+041B) plus katakana ヴ in 汤舜民《鸿门凯歌》; two garbled chars, context unclear
needs_review: Greek Λ (U+039B) in 汤舜民《倘秀才》; context too brief to determine correct character
needs_review: Cyrillic вв (U+0432 ×2) in 汤舜民《尾声·赠明时秀》; two-char gap before 云髻, could be 漆漆/压压/鬒鬒 but unconfirmed
needs_review: Cyrillic В (U+0412) in 刘时中《塞鸿秋》; possibly 开 (撇开手) but unconfirmed
needs_review: Greek Θ (U+0398) in 吴仁卿《鬼三台》; known Θ→种 mapping doesn't fit here (种迁 not meaningful); historical allusion unclear
needs_review: Cyrillic К (U+041A) in 无名氏《南吕·金字经》(Taoist poem); likely 先天气/先天灵/先天道 but unconfirmed
needs_review: Cyrillic М (U+041C) in 无名氏 元曲; likely 眼见间 (yǎn jiàn jiān) but unconfirmed from authoritative source
needs_review: Cyrillic М (U+041C) in 无名氏《离亭宴煞》; same М as above, likely 眼见了 but unconfirmed
needs_review: Cyrillic с (U+0441) in 魏了翁《水调歌头》(王总领生日); authoritative source (ctext.org 全宋詞) shows this character as blank '＿', confirming encoding corruption but correct character unknown

fixes.original: 塞外草先衰江，南雁到迟。
fixes.corrected: 塞外草先衰，江南雁到迟。
fixes.note: Misplaced comma: '江' belongs with second clause '江南雁到迟'; 温庭筠《玉蝴蝶》; standard text confirmed from classical poem knowledge
